name: Competitor Intelligence Tracker
description: Track competitor websites, pricing, and announcements

agents.name: Competitor Scanner
agents.purpose: Scan competitor websites for updates, pricing changes, and announcements
agents.system_prompt_hint: Visit the competitor websites provided. Look for pricing pages, blog posts, product updates, and press releases. Note any changes or new information.

agents.name: Intelligence Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze competitor data and produce actionable intelligence
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the competitor data. Compare pricing, features, and strategies. Highlight key threats and opportunities. Provide actionable recommendations.

author: agentfactory
